subsystems.summary: Wave 1 native menu ownership is closed for the claimed scope.
Wave 1 native message/text ownership is closed for the claimed scope.
Battle has real native ownership and diagnostics. Wave 1 closure signoff exists; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: Wave 1 closure signoff exists; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Save/data runtime, diagnostics, RPG Maker MV/MZ binary save loading, and end-to-end compat save import into native runtime-owned state are landed. Wave 1 closure signoff exists; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: Wave 1 closure signoff exists; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Compat bridge exit has truthful Phase 2 closure evidence, weekly regression cadence, diagnostics/export parity for the bounded import and verification lane, and an explicit signoff artifact; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: Compat bridge exit signoff exists; promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps
Curated corpus maintenance and ongoing truth upkeep remain future work

subsystems.summary: Presentation runtime, bridge, compiled spatial editor panels, end-to-end authoring-to-runtime proof path, release validation harness, concrete ProfileArenaHotReloader with arena-reset lifecycle, presentation schema + migration proof fixture, and command-stream replay + reload determinism tests are landed. Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: Real renderer backend integration (currently mock-backed in production path) remains future work
Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Gameplay ability runtime, inspector/editor surfaces, structured diagnostics snapshot, end-to-end release-grade test, closure signoff artifact, gameplay_ability JSON schema (S24-T01), compat-to-native MZ mapper with deterministic fallback payloads (S24-T02), and AbilityBattleQueue integration into BattleFlowController (S24-T03/T04) are landed. Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps.
mainGaps: AbilityTask backends incomplete: only WaitTime exists; input-wait, event-wait, projectile-collision not implemented
Scripted conditions (activeCondition/passiveCondition strings) intentionally not evaluated
Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Governance foundation has first-slice artifacts landed: breaking-change detection, enhanced readiness checks, template specs, bidirectional readiness/truth drift detection, project-audit artifact checks for input, accessibility, audio, character, mod, analytics, and performance, a bounded controller-binding runtime/panel plus input governance script/fixture contract, a canonical release-signoff workflow artifact, truth reconciliation wired into the full PR gate pipeline (S25-T02), template-spec-bar drift detection (S25-T04 check_template_spec_bar_drift.ps1), and governance gate regression tests (S25-T05/T06/T07).
mainGaps: Governance CLI diagnostics and editor surface panel output are not yet unified into a single parity export path
Promotion to READY requires human review of residual gaps

subsystems.summary: Character identity runtime, editor creator panel, bounded validation runtime, ECS component/system integration, and deterministic spawner are landed with schema and focused tests.
mainGaps: Character identity validator, governance script, and ProjectAudit artifact section are landed for the bounded editor/runtime contract.
Full Create-a-Character workflow (runtime character creation UI) — deferred; no creator-screen runtime or event-driven creation flow is landed.
Appearance preview pipeline — deferred; no character appearance/preview render surface is landed; this is a distinct future work item, not blocking PARTIAL status.

subsystems.summary: Achievement registry with progress tracking, unlock conditions, trigger parsing, event-bus auto-unlock, and editor panel are landed.
mainGaps: Achievement validator is landed with EmptyId, EmptyTitle, EmptyUnlockCondition, ZeroTarget, DuplicateId, and EmptyIconId checks.
Trophy export pipeline — deferred; export-format contract for achievement trophy payloads is not defined. Out-of-tree platform integrations remain explicitly out of scope.
Platform-specific achievement backend integration — explicitly out-of-tree; this integration point is acknowledged but intentionally deferred to avoid vendor lock-in.

subsystems.summary: Accessibility auditor with missing-label, focus-order, contrast, and navigation rules is landed. Live-ingestion adapters for menu (S16), spatial editor (S28-T01), audio mix panel (S28-T01), and battle inspector (S28-T01) are landed.
mainGaps: All four bounded adapter surfaces (menu, spatial, audio, battle) are now covered.
Full WYSIWYG contrast-ratio population from real renderer data remains future work.
Automated CI enforcement of accessibility report artifacts is validated by check_accessibility_governance.ps1.

subsystems.summary: Visual regression harness with golden file management, diff heatmaps, approval tooling, a file-backed executable harness gate, and one bounded OpenGL-enabled local renderer-backed capture lane with committed clear-frame, full-frame-rect, and inset-rect goldens is landed.
mainGaps: CI golden gate enforcement — deferred; automated golden comparison in CI pipeline is not landed.
Broader scene/backend coverage — deferred; current goldens cover only clear-frame, full-frame-rect, and inset-rect; additional scenes and backends remain out of scope.

subsystems.summary: Audio mix preset bank with default profiles, category volume mapping, ducking rules, and editor panel is landed.
mainGaps: Audio mix preset validator is landed with MissingDefaultPreset, ConflictingDuckRules, VolumeOutOfRange, and EmptyCategoryVolumes checks.
Live audio backend integration beyond the current compat-truth harness — deferred; real audio device integration and audio backend runtime are explicitly out-of-scope for the PARTIAL milestone.

subsystems.summary: Platform-specific export validator with per-target requirement checking, fixture-backed validation coverage, PowerShell CI script with JSON output, diagnostics panel with post-export artifact surfacing, bounded real Windows/Web/Linux/macOS bootstrap paths, bundle-level lightweight RLE-plus-XOR payload protection plus keyed integrity-tag validation, bounded repo-owned content bundling for readiness/schema/level-library roots, and governed manifest-driven promoted-asset bundle staging support is landed.
mainGaps: Automatic project-wide asset discovery/bundling remains out of scope.
Full native packaging/signing/notarization is still out of scope.

Stronger cryptographic signing/runtime enforcement beyond the current lightweight bundle-level RLE-plus-XOR plus keyed-integrity lane remains mandatory current backlog — tracked as a pre-READY gate; current lane is not sufficient for production release claims without this hardening.

subsystems.summary: Mod registry with manifest registration, dependency resolution, load-order topology, bounded validation runtime, and editor manager panel is landed.
mainGaps: Mod registry validator, governance script, and ProjectAudit artifact section are landed for the bounded manifest/editor contract.
Live mod loading — deferred; runtime mod activation (hot-load, reload) is not landed.
Sandboxed script execution — deferred; QuickJS sandbox enforcement for mod scripts is not defined at production grade.
Mod-store integration — explicitly out-of-tree; vendor/platform store integration is intentionally deferred.

subsystems.summary: Opt-in analytics dispatcher with deterministic tick counters, event buffering, circular drop, editor panel, and bounded validator/governance coverage is landed.
mainGaps: Analytics validator, governance script, and ProjectAudit artifact section are landed for the bounded opt-in telemetry/editor contract.
Telemetry upload pipeline — deferred; no remote telemetry upload surface is defined or landed.
Session aggregation — deferred; cross-session event aggregation and reporting are not defined.
Privacy audit workflow — deferred; a formal opt-in privacy review and user consent workflow are not established.

barEvidence.accessibility: Baseline accessibility governance (label checks, focus-order audits, contrast rules) is exercised via AccessibilityAuditor unit tests and the accessibility panel adapter. JRPG-specific text-speed control and input-hold alternatives are scaffolded; production enforcement not yet landed.
barEvidence.audio: Audio mix preset governance and validator rules are exercised via test_audio_mix_presets. JRPG-specific battle jingle and BGM-transition bars are scaffolded in AudioMixPresets but not fully validated end-to-end.
barEvidence.input: Menu and battle input paths are covered by test_input_core and test_input_manager. Controller-binding governance and cross-template remap validation are tested via test_input_remap_store. Full closure requires end-to-end remap regression for all menu/battle screens.
barEvidence.localization: Baseline message and menu localization patterns are exercised via message_text_core tests. Completeness metrics, font-set coverage, and per-region test fixtures are not yet landed.
barEvidence.performance: General RPG frame-time budgets are enforced through presentation_runtime arena allocation and profile_arena tests. Large-world streaming and extended-play battle-sequence consistency are not production-validated.

templates.safeScope: Wave 1 native-first baseline with truthful residual gaps.
mainBlockers: Battle and save closure remain open
Cross-cutting readiness bars are not complete; bar evidence is documented but production-grade closure is pending for each bar

barEvidence.accessibility: Baseline accessibility audits (label, contrast, focus) cover dialogue and menu UI elements through AccessibilityAuditor. Visual-novel-specific pacing controls (text auto-advance toggle, read-speed override) are scaffolded but not production-enforced.
barEvidence.audio: Audio mix preset governance is active. Visual-novel-specific ambient BGM layer management and voice-over duck rules are scaffolded; end-to-end validation is not yet landed.
barEvidence.input: Dialogue-advance and menu-navigation input paths are covered by test_input_core. Accessibility-input alternatives (auto-advance, skip) are scaffolded but not yet fully governed.
barEvidence.localization: Baseline message localization patterns from message_text_core tests apply. Visual-novel-specific multi-voice character name insertion and per-language font-set coverage are not yet measured.
barEvidence.performance: Presentation runtime and profile_arena tests provide frame-time budget coverage. Sustained dialogue-heavy session load and asset streaming are not production-validated.

templates.safeScope: Dialogue-heavy projects within current native message and save scope.
mainBlockers: Template-grade governance is not complete; bar evidence is documented but production-grade closure is pending for each bar

barEvidence.accessibility: Baseline accessibility governance (label audits, focus-order, contrast) is active. Turn-based-RPG-specific accessibility expectations (battle-menu hold alternatives, status-screen readability) are scaffolded but not fully enforced.
barEvidence.audio: Audio mix preset governance applies. Turn-based-RPG-specific battle audio transitions and victory fanfare sequencing are scaffolded in AudioMixPresets but not fully validated.
barEvidence.input: Battle and menu input paths are covered. Controller remap and cross-template binding governance via test_input_remap_store apply. Full binding closure for all battle actions is pending.
barEvidence.localization: Baseline message localization patterns from message_text_core apply. Per-template completeness metrics and font-set coverage are not yet measured.
barEvidence.performance: Presentation runtime arena and profile_arena frame-time budget tests apply. Battle-sequence scalability under extended play is not production-validated.

templates.safeScope: A conservative turn-based template slice similar to jrpg without implying broader productization.
mainBlockers: Cross-cutting readiness bars and dedicated template governance remain incomplete; bar evidence is documented but production-grade closure is pending for each bar

barEvidence.audio: Baseline audio mix presets apply; tactics battle audio cue contracts are deferred.
barEvidence.input: Grid navigation and battle action input bounded in test_input_remap_store.cpp and test_input_core.cpp.
barEvidence.localization: Baseline message/menu localization patterns apply; tactics-specific completeness check deferred.
barEvidence.performance: Presentation runtime arena/profile evidence in test_presentation_runtime.cpp; large-map tactic battles remain untested.
